headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Eaton (ETN) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Eaton's current share price really reflects its underlying worth, this breakdown will help you see how the numbers stack up. The stock last closed at US$357.36, with returns of 0.2% over 7 days, a 4.3% decline over 30 days, 9.2% year to date, 31.9% over 1 year, 117.3% over 3 years and 178.1% over 5 years, which naturally raises questions about what is already priced in. Recent headlines around the power grid, electrification and infrastructure spending continue...
